summary: Set 044 Session 3 of 6 — narration-design lock + pre-lock smoke probe. Design-heavy session, no code shipped. (1) Drafted narration-design.md specifying the `[DABBLER-NARRATION v1 key=value ...]` token format, placement rules (session-start 1x mandatory + per-turn conditional; NO session-end marker; open-interval rule for crashed/interrupted runs), content discipline (effort restricted to low|medium|high reasoning axis only; speed axis always native; outcome field cut from v1), parser contract (single parser two backends; regex with LLM-output tolerance; 6 semantic validation tags including placeholder-leakage), A3 conditional branch as predeclared rule with per-backend config flag, per-backend application (AGENTS.md on Copilot; scratch CLAUDE.md on Claude), comparability checklist with acknowledged confounds, pre-lock smoke probe protocol, and full consensus journal documenting all 10 must-fix items applied. (2) Routed locked design through cross-provider consensus: gemini-pro via ai_router APPROVED with 5 must-fix items + 1 nice-to-have ($0.021); gpt-5-4 router calls timed out twice, operator pasted manually to ChatGPT and provided verdict APPROVED with 5 must-fix items + 2 nice-to-haves ($0.00 — operator's subscription); 3 must-fix items convergent across providers (effort-field de-overload; outcome cut; comparability confounds), 4 single-provider must-fixes applied uniformly, 2 nice-to-haves both applied. Bias-cautions preamble was used per spec.md:165 pilot. Net effect: v1 is narrower than pre-consensus draft (no outcome, no speed-axis narration, no value-based precedence rules); more defensive (semantic validation, placeholder-leakage detection, parser tolerance); pre-lock-validated (smoke probe gate added). (3) Resolved §7.1 Copilot custom-instructions channel TBD: `AGENTS.md` files at workspace root (per `copilot help environment` + `--no-custom-instructions` flag docs). v1 commits to AGENTS.md for the synthetic-set live runs; `COPILOT_CUSTOM_INSTRUCTIONS_DIRS` env var and `.github/copilot-instructions.md` (via `copilot init`) are documented alternatives. (4) Executed pre-lock smoke probe against `c:\tmp\dabbler-log-harvest\synthetic-set\` (1114-byte AGENTS.md with substituted §7.1 instruction, Branch A simulated). Marker EMISSION PASSED: verbatim concrete-value substitution, first text output, no code fence, on own line. SURFACE FINDING: marker absent from `session-store.db turns.assistant_response` (DB row 48 bytes, post-marker text only — empirically Copilot 1.0.51 makes two LLM round-trips per turn and persists only the last); marker PRESENT in OTel JSONL `gen_ai.output.messages` attribute of the `chat <model>` span, but only with `OTEL_INSTRUMENTATION_GENAI_CAPTURE_MESSAGE_CONTENT=true`. Bonus discovery: `gen_ai.usage.reasoning.output_tokens=270` of 378 total at default effort — qualifies as candidate Branch A reasoning-axis signal for Copilot pending explicit-effort runs (not documented in S1's Copilot inventory). Folded findings into §5.0 (NEW preconditions block), §5.1 (Copilot input shape rewritten), §5.4 (parser must skip `gen_ai.system_instructions` where AGENTS.md template echoes), §6.3 (Copilot A3 branch deferred to per-backend config flag), §8.1 (content-capture-ON now REQUIRED for Copilot baseline + narrated runs, not optional — partially offsets baseline-comparison.md §3.2.1's Copilot-first redaction-cost advantage), §10 (probe protocol verifies OTel not DB). (5) Marked design LOCKED 2026-05-22: §9 + §12 all four checkboxes complete (consensus done; channel resolved; smoke probe passed; operator approval recorded); header front-matter flipped to LOCKED. (6) Updated spec.md: S3 marked as 'design + smoke probe only — live runs absorbed into S4 with operator approval'; S4 scope-expansion note added with the recommendation to split into S4a (Copilot side: baselines + narrated + delta) and S4b (Claude side: narrated + delta + cross-backend synthesis) as the default plan per Round A verifier guidance. (7) Round A verification via gemini-pro: VERIFIED, no must-fix issues. Three nice-to-haves applied in-line: §5.0 preconditions block elevated; §2.3 regex curly-quote character-class explanation added inline; spec.md S4 split made the default rather than optional. (8) Cumulative S3 routed spend: $0.0575 ($0.021 gemini-pro consensus + $0.0365 gemini-pro Round A; gpt-5-4 manual was zero-cost). Set 044 cumulative across S1+S2+S3: $0.174 of $15.00 NTE. Smoke probe and Copilot live-run setup are operator-side zero-router-dollar. §11 open empirical questions inherited forward to S4: 4 questions including Copilot reasoning_effort attribute presence with explicit `--effort high`, parameterization mechanism robustness, and whether the reasoning.output_tokens value range distinguishes low/medium/high effort levels.
files_changed: docs/session-sets/044-ai-chat-log-discovery-and-experiments/verification-output/consensus-design-prompt-manual.txt (new, 28954-char self-contained prompt for manual gpt-5-4 paste)

reason.specifics: S4 (scope-expanded per spec.md note 2026-05-22) absorbs the previously-deferred S1+S2 live runs AND the S3 Copilot narrated experiment AND the cross-backend synthesis. Default plan is to split S4 into S4a (Copilot baseline + Claude baseline + Copilot narrated + Copilot delta in copilot-narration-results.md) and S4b (Claude narrated + Claude delta in claude-narration-results.md + cross-backend synthesis in cross-backend-synthesis.md), with each as its own orchestrator check-out. The narration contract is LOCKED in narration-design.md as of 2026-05-22; the four §11 open empirical questions inherit forward (Copilot reasoning_effort with explicit --effort high; parameterization mechanism robustness; reasoning.output_tokens value-range bucket distinguishability; OTel exporter configuration robustness). Continuous Claude check-out for S4a preserves H1 single-writer lock invariant and matches the operator's established trajectory across S1+S2+S3 (claude/anthropic/claude-opus-4-7/high). At S4a start: orchestrator will (a) verify smoke-probe-confirmed AGENTS.md channel still works (one trivial Copilot probe to confirm regression hasn't happened); (b) run the full Copilot baseline task battery against synthetic-set with OTEL_INSTRUMENTATION_GENAI_CAPTURE_MESSAGE_CONTENT=true; (c) run Claude baseline equivalent against the synthetic-set workspace; (d) edit AGENTS.md to add narration instructions; (e) re-run Copilot task battery in narrated mode; (f) compute delta per §8 comparability checklist; (g) write copilot-narration-results.md; (h) Round A verification; (i) close S4a, hand off to S4b. If S4 starts and the operator decides the work IS scoped tightly enough for one session, the split can be skipped.
